hooks.command: $i = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $p = $i.tool_input.file_path; if ($p -and $p -match 'src[\\/]') { Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"You just edited a file under src/. Review whether CLAUDE.md (architecture overview, Key files table, data flow, plugin/pending-marks/selection sections) still accurately describes the code after this change. If the change introduces a new file, renames one, alters data flow, or changes a documented behavior, update CLAUDE.md now. If the change is purely internal (bug fix, refactor with no documented surface change), skip."}}' }
